data.name: Lotta

weaponImprint.name: M1 Super 90
weaponImprint.effect: For every 2/2/2/2/2/1 point of Confectance Index consumed, increase damage dealt by 2%/3%/4%/5%/10%/10%, up to 10%/12%/16%/20%/20%/20%.

data.effects: This Doll, who is both exceedingly shy and cautious, has a knack for noticing subtle details that others miss. Do keep in mind that her slow and reserved nature when socializing may require some extra patience and understanding.

skills.name: Heartfelt Confession
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Bonds of Friendship
skills.description: When an enemy target within range is affected by [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta], performs 1 instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to them. This can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Increases mobility by 1 point. When an enemy target within range is affected by [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta], performs 1 instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 1 point of stability damage to them. This can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Increases mobility by 1 point. When an enemy target within range is affected by [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta], performs 1 instance of [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd], dealing AoE Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 2 points of stability damage to them. This can be triggered up to 2 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase mobility of self by 1 point.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Stability damage dealt by [effect:bf9cca5c-a432-44ad-ba77-05ba7435b1dd] increases by 1 point.

skills.name: Cryo Rounds
skills.description: Selects 1 direction and deals AoE Freeze damage equal to 60% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x5 area in the selected direction, destroying any destructible Cover outside a 3x3 area around this unit. Additionally, applies [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta] to targets for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 direction and deals AoE Freeze damage equal to 60% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3x5 area in the selected direction, destroying any destructible Cover outside a 3x3 area around this unit. Additionally, applies [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta] to targets for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase the duration of [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta] by 1 turn.

skills.name: Neural Adjustment
skills.description: Fills Confectance Index and gains [effect:90e40fd3-e06c-4dca-aa63-464cf6e0c9f7] for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Fills Confectance Index and gains [effect:13704d31-93dc-41f4-8ae8-52bf9ceb0a06] for 2 turns.

skills.name: Amplified Courage
skills.description: Select enemy target within 6 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it and all enemy targets within 3 tiles that ignores Cover damage reduction. If it hits 2 or more targets, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select enemy target within 6 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it and all enemy targets within 3 tiles that ignores Cover damage reduction. If it hits 2 or more targets, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. If phase weakness is exploited, apply [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df] to the target for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Select 1 tile within 6 tiles of the user to launch an attack, dealing AoE Freeze damage equal to 100% of attack to it and all enemy targets within 3 tiles that ignores Cover damage reduction. If it hits 2 or more targets, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb]. If phase weakness is exploited, apply [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df] to the target for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If phase weakness is exploited, apply [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta] to the target for 1 turn.

keys.effect: Increase damage dealt against enemy targets with movement debuffs by 7%.
keys.materialsData: Unlocks after obtaining all Fixed Keys

keys.effect: If the target's stability before attacking is greater than 0, damage dealt to the target is increased by 10%.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
Increaes damage dealt to enemy targets with Freeze debuffs by 10%.
if Freeze damage is dealt, applies [effect:d85addc9-1d0c-46cb-a37a-377dde1be0ae] to the target for 2 turns.
When HP is greater than 50%, Reduce AoE damage taken by 20%.
Add a new effect to the active skill Cryo Rounds. Knock back to the target by 3 tiles.
The active skill Neural Adjustment gains a new effect: Gains 1 stack of [effect:af640815-bbef-471b-8888-cee6c3d8b4a4].

vertebrae.effect: If phase weakness is exploited, apply [effect:5c2c4fcd-9821-4a40-a325-13723cdbe0df|doll:lotta] to the target for 1 turn.

doll.name: Lotta
doll.effects: This Doll, who is both exceedingly shy and cautious, has a knack for noticing subtle details that others miss. Do keep in mind that her slow and reserved nature when socializing may require some extra patience and understanding.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Freeze debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Freeze damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Before moving, receive fixed damage equal to 10% of attack from the unit that applied this effect. Freeze movement debuff.
